setup_tool.label: Setup Tool
setup_tool.hint: Tool used to setup a system for simulation.

energy_tolerance.label: Energy Tolerance
energy_tolerance.hint: Tolerance energy for when minimization stops, this is when the maximum force on any atom is less than this value (default is often 1000 kJ/mol/nm or 10−4kcal), given as a float.

number_of_minimisation_steps.label: Number Of Minimisation Steps
number_of_minimisation_steps.hint: Number of integration steps performed during minimisation of the system, given as an integer.

minimisation_distance_step_size.label: Minimisation Distance Step Size
minimisation_distance_step_size.hint: The distance the algorithm moves in a single step, controls how large a step the optimizer takes during the initial phase of minimizing the potential energy of a structure, given as a float.

minimisation_algorithm.label: Minimisation Algorithm
minimisation_algorithm.hint: Algorithm used to minimise particle interactions.

simulation_tool.label: Simulation Tool
simulation_tool.hint: Tools/utility used within simulation engines to perform simulations.

simulation_software.label: Simulation Software
simulation_software.hint: Simulation software used to perform molecular dynamics simulations and related functions.

simulation_tool.label: Simulation Tool
simulation_tool.hint: Tools/utility used within simulation engines to perform simulations.

simulation_software.label: Simulation Software
simulation_software.hint: Simulation software used to perform molecular dynamics simulations and related functions.

simulation_tool.label: Simulation Tool
simulation_tool.hint: Tools/utility used within simulation engines to perform simulations.

simulation_software.label: Simulation Software
simulation_software.hint: Simulation software used to perform molecular dynamics simulations and related functions.

simulation_software_version.label: Simulation Software Version
simulation_software_version.hint: Version of software used to perform simulation step.

analysis_tool.label: Analysis Tool
analysis_tool.hint: Tools used to analyse simulation outputs.

analysis_software.label: Analysis Software
analysis_software.hint: Software used to analyse simulation outputs.

analysis_method.label: Analysis Method
analysis_method.hint: Methods used to analyse simulation outputs.

random_seed.label: Random Seed
random_seed.hint: Random number used to set (a) distribution of velocities across particles at the start of a simulation and (b) pseudo-random values for dynamics/couplings, given as an integer.

integrator_algorithm.label: Integrator Algorithm
integrator_algorithm.hint: Algorithm used to integrate the simulation.

frame_step.label: Frame Step
frame_step.hint: Time between saved snapshots/frames in a simulation, given as a float.

time_step.label: Integration Step
time_step.hint: Time between integration steps in a simulation, given as a float.

number_of_steps.label: Number Of Steps
number_of_steps.hint: Number of integration steps performed in the simulation, given as an integer.

simulation_time.label: Simulation Time
simulation_time.hint: Total time molecular dynamics have been sampled in a simulation trajectory, often given by the number of integration steps multiplied by the simulation time step used by the integrator, given as a float.

barostat_algorithm.label: Barostat Algorithm
barostat_algorithm.hint: Barostat algorithm used to set the pressure in a simulation.

compressibility.label: Compressibility
compressibility.hint: Compressibility of the simulated system, given as a float.

value_unit.label: Value Unit
value_unit.hint: measures how the system volume responds to pressure changes.

compressibility_vector.label: Compressibility Vector
compressibility_vector.hint: Compressibility of the simulated system, given as a float.

value_unit.label: Value Unit
value_unit.hint: measures how the system volume responds to pressure changes.

target_pressure.label: Target Pressure
target_pressure.hint: Target/reference pressure set to reach in the simulation, given as a float.

target_pressure_vector.label: Target Pressure Vector
target_pressure_vector.hint: Target/reference pressure set to reach in the simulation, given as a 3x3 array.

pressure_time_constant.label: Pressure Time Constant
pressure_time_constant.hint: Time constant/step (relaxation time of pressure) used for coupling the system pressure, given as a float.

pressure_coupling_frequency.label: Pressure Coupling Frequency
pressure_coupling_frequency.hint: Step frequency to apply the barostat.

pressure_coupling_type.label: Pressure Coupling Type
pressure_coupling_type.hint: Coupling type for adjusting box vectors.

thermostat_algorithm.label: Thermostat Algorithm
thermostat_algorithm.hint: Thermostat algorithm used to set the temperature in a simulation.

target_temperature.label: Target Temperature
target_temperature.hint: Target/reference temperature set to reach in the simulation, given as a float.

target_temperature_vector.label: Target Temperature Vector
target_temperature_vector.hint: Target/reference temperature set to reach in the simulation, given as a list (e.g. 300, 300).

collision_frequency.label: Collision Frequency
collision_frequency.hint: Collision frequency for the integrator, given as a float.

temperature_time_constant.label: Temperature Time Constant
temperature_time_constant.hint: Time constant for coupling the system temperature in seconds units, given as a list (e.g. 0.1, 0.1).

coupling_group.label: Coupling Group
coupling_group.hint: A subset of atoms for which temperature is controlled, often needed for simulating complex systems (e.g., protein in water), used in gromacs, given as a string

chain_length.label: Chain Length
chain_length.hint: Usually required in the Nosé-Hoover thermostat, the chain length (e.g., nh-chain-length in GROMACS) is used to maintain canonical distribution, given as an integer.

friction_coefficient.label: Friction Coefficient
friction_coefficient.hint: Usually used in the Langevin thermostat, the friction coefficient determines the strength of coupling between a system and a heat bath, given as a float.

value_unit.label: Value Unit
value_unit.hint: Relationship between applied forces and the resulting resistance to motion.

restraints.label: Restraints?
restraints.hint: Are any positional restraints applied to molecule dynamics? (Restraints usually use harmonic potentials to keep a value near a target).

electrostatic_cutoff_distance.label: Electrostatic Cutoff Distance
electrostatic_cutoff_distance.hint: Distance in Angstrom at which a electrostatic interaction is turned off and a long-range non-bonded method is turned on, given as a float.

vdw_cutoff_distance.label: Vdw Cutoff Distance
vdw_cutoff_distance.hint: Distance in Angstrom at which a Van der Waals interaction is turned off and a long-range non-bonded method is turned on.

bond_length_constraints_algorithm.label: Bond Length Constraints Algorithm
bond_length_constraints_algorithm.hint: Fix specific molecular degrees of freedom—typically fast bond vibrations involving hydrogen atoms. By eliminating these high-frequency motions, constraints allow for larger integration time steps (e.g., 2 fs instead of 0.5 fs), significantly speeding up simulations without disrupting system dynamics.

long_range_interaction_method.label: Long Range Interaction Method
long_range_interaction_method.hint: Method used to implement long-range interactions of point charges in the simulation.

simulation_averages.label: Simulation Averages
simulation_averages.hint: Average values of observables outputted from the simulation.

average_kinetic_energy.label: Average Kinetic Energy
average_kinetic_energy.hint: Average kinetic energy sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_potential_energy.label: Average Potential Energy
average_potential_energy.hint: Average potential energy sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_enthalpy.label: Average Enthalpy
average_enthalpy.hint: Average enthalpy sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_pressure.label: Average Pressure
average_pressure.hint: Average pressure sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_temperature.label: Average Temperature
average_temperature.hint: Average temperature sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_volume.label: Average Volume
average_volume.hint: Average volume sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_volume_vector.label: Average Volume Vector
average_volume_vector.hint: Average volume sampled from the simulation, given as a list, (e.g. 10, 10, 10).

bonds.label: Bonds?
bonds.hint: Are bond parameters present in the topology?

dihedrals.label: Dihedrals?
dihedrals.hint: Are dihedral parameters present in the topology?

masses.label: Masses?
masses.hint: Are masses present in the topology?

fixed_charges.label: Fixed Charges?
fixed_charges.hint: Are fixed charges on atoms included in the topology?

system_charge.label: System Charge
system_charge.hint: Total electrostatic charge of the system given by the elementary charge (e).

box_dimensions.label: Box Dimensions
box_dimensions.hint: The lengths/dimensions of the box used to simulate the system.

box_angles.label: Box Angles
box_angles.hint: The angles of the box used to simulate the system.

box_type.label: Box Type
box_type.hint: Types of box used to simulate the system.

periodic_boundary_conditions.label: Periodic Boundary Conditions
periodic_boundary_conditions.hint: What directions in a simulation cell periodic boundaries are set if they are turned on.

positions.label: Positions?
positions.hint: Are per-frame positions included in the trajectory?

forces.label: Forces?
forces.hint: Are per-frame forces included in the trajectory?

velocities.label: Velocities?
velocities.hint: Are per-frame velocities included in the trajectory?

polarizable_charges.label: Polarizable Charges?
polarizable_charges.hint: Are per-frame polarizable charges included in the trajectory?

energies.label: Energies?
energies.hint: Are per-frame energies included in the trajectory?

water.label: Water?
water.hint: Are water molecules included in the trajectory?

replica.label: Replica?
replica.hint: Is this trajectory a replica of another provided trajectory?

frame_count.label: Frame Count
frame_count.hint: Total number of snapshots that make up a trajectory.

system_counts.label: System Counts
system_counts.hint: Entity counts across the simulated system.

total_molecule_count.label: Total Molecule Count
total_molecule_count.hint: Total number of simulated molecules, defined as bonded atoms or beads.

total_atom_count.label: Total Atom Count
total_atom_count.hint: Total number of atoms in the simulation.

unique_molecule_count.label: Unique Molecule Count
unique_molecule_count.hint: Number of unique simulated molecules, defined as bonded atoms or beads.

salt_concentration.label: Salt Concentration
salt_concentration.hint: Concentration of salt in the solution.

molecule_ID.label: Molecule ID
molecule_ID.hint: Persistent identifier of a molecule being simulated.

SMILES.label: SMILES
SMILES.hint: Simplified Molecular Input Line Entry System (SMILES) ASCII-based line notation used to describe chemical structures. It represents molecular graphs with atoms and bonds, allowing software to convert these short strings into 2D or 3D models.

InChI.label: InChI
InChI.hint: The International Chemical Identifier (InChi) is a textual identifier for chemical substances, designed to provide a standard way to encode molecular information

InChIKey.label: InChIKey
InChIKey.hint: The condensed, 27 character InChIKey, which is a hashed version of the full InChI (using the SHA-256 algorithm), designed to allow for easy web searches of chemical compounds.

alphafold_ID.label: AlphaFold ID
alphafold_ID.hint: AlphaFold predicted protein structure identifier (AlphaFold DB, EMBL-EBI)

PubChem_CID.label: PubChem CID
PubChem_CID.hint: PubChem CID of chemical molecules and their activities against biological assays.

protein_sequence.label: Protein Sequence
protein_sequence.hint: One letter sequence for protein amino acids.

nucleic_sequence.label: Nucleic Sequence
nucleic_sequence.hint: One letter sequence for nucleic acid nucleotides.

predicted_structure.label: Predicted Structure?
predicted_structure.hint: Are the molecule positions derived from a prediction?

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

molecular_formula.label: Molecular Formula
molecular_formula.hint: The molecular formula of a molecule\

molecular_weight.label: Molecular Weight
molecular_weight.hint: The molecular weight of a molecule.

molecule_count.label: Molecule Count
molecule_count.hint: Number of instances of a given molecule, defined as bonded atoms or beads.

atom_count.label: Atom Count
atom_count.hint: Number of atoms in a molecule.

monomer_count.label: Monomer Count
monomer_count.hint: Number of monomeric units in a polymer(e.g. protein or nucleic acid).

potentials.label: Potentials
potentials.hint: Force field potentials used to describe simulated particles.

water_potential_name.label: Water Potential Name
water_potential_name.hint: Force fields used to parametrize water molecules in a simulation.

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

protein_potential_name.label: Protein Potential Name
protein_potential_name.hint: Force fields used to parametrize amino acids in proteins in a simulation.

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

lipid_potential_name.label: Lipid Potential Name
lipid_potential_name.hint: Force fields used to parametrize lipids in a simulation.

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

nucleic_potential_name.label: Nucleic Potential Name
nucleic_potential_name.hint: Force fields used to parametrize nucleic acids in a simulation.

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

carbohydrate_potential_name.label: Carbohydrate Potential Name
carbohydrate_potential_name.hint: Force fields used to parametrize carbohydrates in a simulation.

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

polymer_potential.label: Polymer Potential
polymer_potential.hint: Force field for polymers (excluding proteins and nucleic acids).

polymer_potential_name.label: Polymer Potential Name
polymer_potential_name.hint: Force fields used to parametrize polymers in a simulation.

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

general_potential_name.label: General Potential Name
general_potential_name.hint: Force fields used to parametrize molecules in a simulation.

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

machine_learned_potential.label: Machine Learned Potential
machine_learned_potential.hint: ML force field for molecules (in general).

modified.label: Modified?
modified.hint: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

hardware.label: Hardware
hardware.hint: Computer hardware used to perform simulation.

execution_platform.label: Execution Platform
execution_platform.hint: Type of platform used to run the simulation.

node_type.label: Node Type
node_type.hint: Type of compute node used in the system.

node_count.label: Node Count
node_count.hint: Number of compute nodes used for the run.

CPU_vendor.label: CPU Vendor
CPU_vendor.hint: Vendor of the CPU used in the compute nodes.

CPU_architecture.label: CPU Architecture
CPU_architecture.hint: CPU architecture used by the compute nodes.

sockets_per_node.label: Sockets Per Node
sockets_per_node.hint: Number of physical CPU sockets in each compute node.

cores_per_socket.label: Cores Per Socket
cores_per_socket.hint: Number of physical CPU cores in each socket.

threads_per_core.label: Threads Per Core
threads_per_core.hint: Number of hardware threads per physical core.

GPU_vendor.label: GPU Vendor
GPU_vendor.hint: Vendor of the GPU used in the compute nodes.

GPUs_per_node.label: GPUs Per Node
GPUs_per_node.hint: Number of GPUs present in each compute node.

memory_per_node.label: Memory Per Node
memory_per_node.hint: Amount of memory installed per compute node.

software.label: Software
software.hint: Computer software used to perform simulation.

operating_system.label: Operating System
operating_system.hint: List of operating systems installed on the hardware used to perform the simulation.

scheduler.label: Scheduler
scheduler.hint: Job scheduler used for simulation execution.

MPI_library.label: MPI Library
MPI_library.hint: MPI implementation used for message passing.

container_runtime.label: Container Runtime
container_runtime.hint: Container runtime used to package and run software.

wall_time.label: Wall Time
wall_time.hint: Total elapsed runtime of the simulation.

energy_consumption.label: Energy Consumption
energy_consumption.hint: Total energy consumed by the simulation run.
